title: Junior Instructional Designer at IIM Ahmedabad Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Junior Instructional Designer at IIM Ahmedabad Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
IIM Ahmedabad Consulting Pvt Ltd, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Instructional Designer for our Aurangabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About IIM Ahmedabad Consulting Pvt Ltd:
IIM Ahmedabad Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Support students with special educational needs
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Student Assessment

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Learning & development budget
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIM Ahmedabad Consulting Pvt Ltd!
